title: Perl Weekly Challenge - 011
task1_desc: Write a script that computes the equal point in the Fahrenheit and Celsius scales, knowing that  the freezing point of water is 32 °F and 0 °C, and that the boiling point of water is 212 °F and 100 °C. This challenge was proposed by **Laurent Rosenfeld**.
task1_body: > Write a script that computes the equal point in the Fahrenheit and Celsius scales, knowing that  the freezing point of water is 32 °F and 0 °C, and that the boiling point of water is 212 °F and 100 °C. This challenge was proposed by **Laurent Rosenfeld**.
task2_desc: Write a script to create an Indentity Matrix for the given size. For example, if the size is 4, then create Identity Matrix 4x4. For more information about **Indentity Matrix**, please read the [wiki](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Identity_matrix) page.
task2_body: > Write a script to create an Indentity Matrix for the given size. For example, if the size is 4, then create Identity Matrix 4x4. For more information about **Indentity Matrix**, please read the [wiki](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Identity_matrix) page.
